What We Do

Services for
Sellers & Investors

Whether you are selling a property or deploying capital — Orvane Atlas is the firm that stands between you and everything that could go wrong.

01 — For Sellers & Buyers

Property
Brokerage

Whether you're selling your property or buying your next one — we handle everything with professionalism, speed, and complete transparency.

  • Residential & commercial sales
  • Strategic land acquisition & disposal
  • Off-plan advisory & developer relations
  • Title verification & full due diligence
  • End-to-end transaction management
02 — For Investors

Investment
Advisory

We help serious investors find the right opportunities, structure their investments correctly, and protect their capital at every step.

  • Investment strategy & portfolio structuring
  • Market analysis & property valuation
  • Cross-border transaction structuring
  • Mortgage brokerage & financial advisory
  • Diaspora investment services
03 — Ongoing

Asset
Management

Your property working for you — wherever you are in the world. Full management, full reporting, zero surprises.

  • Tenant sourcing & management
  • Rent collection & detailed reporting
  • Facility & maintenance management
  • Regular inspection & asset protection
  • Diaspora absentee owner services

Who We Are

Built on Trust.
Driven by Purpose.

Shedrack Eneje
Founder & Principal Broker — Orvane Atlas Limited

Orvane Atlas was founded on a simple but powerful conviction: too many people have lost their hard-earned money in real estate — not because the market is bad, but because the right firm did not exist.

We are a real estate brokerage and investment advisory firm incorporated in Nigeria, serving buyers, sellers, and investors across Africa and global markets.

"We exist to be the firm that holds up its end — every single time, for every single client."
Integrity
Every transaction held to an absolute standard of honesty.
Transparency
No hidden fees. No surprises. You see everything.
Protection
Your capital protected at every step of every transaction.
Results
Real assets that deliver real, measurable returns.

Why Orvane Atlas

The Standard
Every Investor Deserves

01

Verified Transactions Only

Every property goes through rigorous title verification and full due diligence before we present it.

02

Built for Diaspora Investors

Our entire process is built for clients who are not physically present. Same standard wherever you are.

03

Institutional Discipline

Documentation, reporting, and accountability at every step. Because your assets deserve the highest standard.

04

Your Goals First. Always.

Every recommendation we make is in service of your investment objectives, your timeline, and your peace of mind.
